retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and always succeeds; retrying would be a use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases one reference on the skb (via dev_kfree_skb_any) and increments the device's TX dropped statistics. After calling bond_tx_drop, the caller must not use the skb again, as it has been freed or its reference count decremented. The function always consumes the skb and returns NET_XMIT_DROP, indicating the packet was dropped. This is an unconditional release; there is no failure path.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to drop an skb by releasing its reference (put via dev_kfree_skb_any) and updating drop stats; the stats increment is trivial and standard for such drop helpers.

check.reason: The call dev_kfree_skb_any(skb) is a put operation on skb. Parameter index 2 corresponds to skb.
